	"""

	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'devicePanel'
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'UnitName':'','UnitDescription':'','UnitLabelTo':-1,'WorkStationType':-1,'IPAddress':'','AssetNumber':'','DeviceSerialNumber':'','AttachedTo': -1}

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9_ ]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar

	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Reset all values. 
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'devicePanel'
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'UnitName':'','UnitDescription':'','UnitLabelTo':-1,'WorkStationType':-1,'IPAddress':'','AssetNumber':'','DeviceSerialNumber':'','AttachedTo': -1}		 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update values into DB. 
	"""
	try:
		AssetNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAssetNumber").getChild("txt").props.text
		DeviceSerialNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDeviceSerialNumber").getChild("txt").props.text
		Description = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntUnitDesciption").getChild("txt").props.text
		DeviceName = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntUnitName").getChild("txt").props.text
		IPAddress = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIPAddress").getChild("txt").props.text
		MST_DeviceType_Id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntDeviceType").getChild("drpDeviceType").props.value
		MST_WorkStation_Id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAttachedTo").getChild("drpAttachedTo").props.value
		Port = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntPort").getChild("txt").props.text
		isActive=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		workStationtation=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAttachedTo").getChild("drpAttachedTo").props.value
		workStationChange=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsWSChange").getChild("drpIsWSChange").props.value
		
		system.perspective.print("Workstation in Save buton:%s"%MST_WorkStation_Id)
		WS = 0
		message = ''
		#### Check data in table
		for i in MST_WorkStation_Id:
			params={'WorkStation':i,'DeviceName':DeviceName}
			result=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Device/CheckData",params)
			res = result.getRowCount()
			system.perspective.print("Result from query:%s"%res)
			if res != 0:
				for val in result:
					Id = val['MST_WorkStation_Id']
					if Id == i:
						WorkStationName = val['WorkStation']
						WS = 1
				message = "Device is already present against selected workstation '%s'"%WorkStationName
				state = "error"
				break
		if self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text == 'Add' and res==0 :
			CreatedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			IsActive = 1
			Id = 0
			DeviceMapId = 0
			system.perspective.print("DevicemApId in Add:%s"%str(DeviceMapId))
			result = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Device.InsertUpdateDevice.InsertUpdateDevice( AssetNumber, DeviceSerialNumber,CreatedBy, Description, DeviceName, IPAddress, MST_DeviceType_Id,  MST_WorkStation_Id, Port, Id,IsActive,DeviceMapId,WS)
			system.util.getLogger("insert").info(str(result))
			if(result>0):
				message = "Device details added successfully."
				state = "success"
				auditMsg=str(DeviceName) + message
				
		if self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text == 'Edit':
			
			ModifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			
			system.perspective.print("In Save ID before:%s"%self.session.custom.selectedDeviceId)
			Id = self.session.custom.selectedDeviceId
			system.perspective.print("In save Id after:%s"%Id)
			DeviceMapId = self.session.custom.DeviceMapId
			IsActive = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
			if MST_DeviceType_Id != 3: ## other than Printer device type
				Port = ""
			if self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsWSChange").getChild("drpIsWSChange").props.value == 0:
				result = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Device.InsertUpdateDevice.InsertUpdateDevice( AssetNumber,DeviceSerialNumber, ModifiedBy, Description, DeviceName, IPAddress, MST_DeviceType_Id,  MST_WorkStation_Id, Port, Id,IsActive,DeviceMapId,WS)
				system.perspective.print("In Else of Device Save:%s"%result)
				if(result>0):
					message = "Device details Updated successfully."
					state = "success"
					auditMsg=str(DeviceName) + message
			else:
				if WS == 1:
					message = "Device is already present against selected workstation '%s'"%WorkStationName
					state = "warning"
				else:
					result = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Device.InsertUpdateDevice.InsertUpdateDevice( AssetNumber,DeviceSerialNumber, ModifiedBy, Description, DeviceName, IPAddress, MST_DeviceType_Id,  MST_WorkStation_Id, Port, Id,IsActive,DeviceMapId,WS)
					if(result>0):
						message = "Device details Updated successfully."
						state = "success"
						auditMsg=str(DeviceName) + message
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		messageType = 'tableRefresh'  	 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		#addToAuditLogStart
		system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
		category='Adminstation'
		subCategory='Device Configuration'
		if(Id!=0):
			prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
			#curDesc={"linetypecode":LineTypeCode, "mode":mode, "isActive":isActive, "Code":bomId }
			curDesc = {
			    "AssetNumber":AssetNumber,
			    "DeviceSerialNumber":DeviceSerialNumber,
			    "Description":Description,
			    "DeviceName":DeviceName,
			    "IPAddress":IPAddress,
			    "MST_DeviceType_Id":MST_DeviceType_Id,
			    "MST_WorkStation_Id":MST_WorkStation_Id,
			    "Port":Port,
			    "isActive":isActive,
			    "workStationtation":workStationtation,
			    "workStationChange":workStationChange
			}
			system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
			system.perspective.print(curDesc)
			description=str(auditMsg)+"Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
		else:
			description=str(auditMsg)
		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
		
		#addAuditLogEnd
	except:
		message = "Something went wrong.Please contact system Adminstration."
		state = "error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		screenName ='DevicePanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/devicePanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed  ->cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print("errorFunction: "+str(errorFunction)+" description: "+str(description)+" lineno: "+str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 	
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	load=payload.copy()
	system.perspective.print(payload)
	import json
	load_json = json.dumps(load)
	self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json

	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):

	# Calling Special Character Check Function

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^0-9.]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9_]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/05/2024
		Purpose: Insert row values into panel. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	try:
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text = payload['headerLabel']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntUnitName").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['UnitName']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntUnitDesciption").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['UnitDescription']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAttachedTo").getChild("drpAttachedTo").props.value = payload['AttachedTo']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntDeviceType").getChild("drpDeviceType").props.value = payload['DeviceType']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAssetNumber").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['AssetNumber']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIPAddress").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['IPAddress']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntPort").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['Port']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = payload['IsActive']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSave").getChild("btn_Save").props.text = payload["Action"]
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntDeviceSerialNumber").getChild("txt").props.text = payload["DeviceSerialNumber"]
	except:
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='devicePanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/DevicePanel')  
		errorFunction = str('messageHandler/devicePanel')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
